creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
Submitter isn't committer currently, but is a member of clusteradm. Please be sure to check before assuming someone with @FreeBSD.org is a committer. (And even if they were a committer, they may be a src committer and not a ports committer, so you really have to check that they are a committer of the correct type before assigning the PR back to them.)
